title: Offbeat Wall Street research firm says it sent an analyst to Strait of Hormuz. Here's what they learned
summary_full: Before the U.S and Israel began their war against Iran, about 20% of the world's oil was shipped through the narrow Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: Before the U.S and Israel began their war against Iran, about 20% of the world's oil was shipped through the narrow Strait of Hormuz.
